settings.title: Impact
settings.description:
They say our standards are as high as those we surround ourselves with. It’s for this reason, when it comes to partnerships, we’re more selective than ever. It’s also why we’re honoured to celebrate our enduring relationship with IMPACT, an independent non-profit organisation that transforms how natural resources are managed in areas where security and human rights are at risk.

Since 2020, 1% of our total online sales have been donated to IMPACT in a bid to support meaningful change through the incredible on-ground work that they do. Similarly, the education they impart to us and the connection with their inspiring team empowers us to fight for industry transformation. We are so grateful to support and learn from their incredible work.
settings.feature_text: When it comes to widespread industry change, we rely on the scale and reach of our select relationships.

settings.title: In Conversation with Joanne Lebert
settings.description:
We spend our days immersed in the worlds of sustainability and ethical manufacturing, constantly seeking out ways in which we can improve upon our learnings and our business process. We also think it’s our responsibility to bring our community along this journey with us – and this conversation might be the perfect place to start.

Here, our founder Natalie Fitch hosts an expansive conversation with Joanne Lebert, the executive director at IMPACT – a Canada-based non-profit committed to transforming how natural resources are managed in areas where security and human rights are at risk. From delving into IMPACT’s top priorities to regeneration management and the Kimberley Process, we hope this insightful and honest discussion is as inspiring for you as IMPACT’s guidance is for us.

settings.title: Watch the Interview
settings.html: <iframe src="https://player.vimeo.com/video/852887587?h=f08dc2a34e&color=f8f6f2&portrait=0" width="900" height="900" frameborder="0" allow="autoplay; fullscreen; picture-in-picture" allowfullscreen=""></iframe>

settings.description: Driven by the intention to address areas of concern specific to our industry, we embarked on a journey to partner with a global organisation are proud to be a contributing partner of global organisation IMPACT, who work to transform how natural resources are managed in areas where security and human rights are at risk. Read our interview with Joanne Lebert, Executive Director of IMPACT to learn more about their important work.
